aeo_readiness.summary: AI models are unlikely to cite PAPPAS PARTS & SERVICE, INC due to the absence of structured data, conversational content, and authority signals.
quick_wins: Create and publish an FAQ page with relevant HVAC questions and answers

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is not found, making the business invisible to Google AI and significantly limiting local search visibility.
critical_issues: Google Business Profile not set up
Lack of GBP photos, posts, and Q&A engagement

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is excellent with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms
Expand NAP citations to additional relevant directories

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local HVAC service queries and emergency repair requests
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Setting up a Google Business Profile and adding LocalBusiness schema
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, industry partnerships, and expertise through content and schema

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, PAPPAS PARTS & SERVICE, INC is missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The business is not found on Google Business Profile and lacks essential schema markup, making it invisible to AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach includes setting up structured data, optimizing GBP, and creating conversational content to position your business as the go-to HVAC expert.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-50% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for PAPPAS PARTS & SERVICE, INC
opening_line: We analyzed your website and found significant opportunities to improve your visibility with AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your digital presence for AI search.
